name: tl-icalendar
postCreateCommand:
pip install pipenv && pipenv install --dev && mkdir -p ~/.aws && cat >> ~/.aws/config << 'EOF'
[default]
sso_start_url = https://d-9967466958.awsapps.com/start
sso_region = eu-central-1
sso_account_id = 979200226534
sso_role_name = AdministratorAccess
region = eu-central-1
EOF
